---
name: Feature
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
labels: ["type/feature"]
---

## Summary

Describe the feature in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What user or operator problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the intended behavior and key implementation idea.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Behavior is clearly defined
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `.env.example`) if needed
- [ ] Dev validation completed before prod promotion

## Notes

Link related issues, PRs, and rollout considerations.
